name: Sourdough Waffles
recipeIngredient: 4 cups flour (bread, with or without whole wheat)
enough flour to make as thin or thick as desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Night before: Mix 1/2 cup of sourdough starter with 4 cups of water and 4 cups of flour in a nonmetal bowl. Cover with a towel and let sit out at room temperature.
2. Morning of: Add 2 tbsp sugar (or equivalent), 1 tsp baking soda, 1 heaping tsp baking powder, and 2 egg whites (if desired) to the mixture. Adjust the amount of flour to achieve the desired thickness or thinness for your waffles.
3. Grease a non-stick waffle iron (spray the cooking surface before the first use; spraying may not be necessary on subsequent uses).
4. Cook the batter in the waffle iron until it is done, ensuring that it does not have quite the cardboard texture of Special K Eggos.
Of course, you can add any flavorings you wish to customize your sourdough waffles.
